context: Evaluates the agent's ability to detect existing model routing in opencode.json and skip unnecessary user prompts.

checklist.name: Detect existing config
checklist.description: Agent reads opencode.json and detects subAgents config

checklist.name: Skip model question
checklist.description: Agent does NOT ask the user about models

checklist.name: Use configured models
checklist.description: Agent reports model assignments from config

checklist.name: Parallel spawn
checklist.description: All reviewers are spawned in parallel
